project_philosophy.core_principle: Don't just answer the question. Understand what the person actually needs, connect what should be connected, and be honest about what you don't know.
project_philosophy.positioning: Companies lose 42% of their knowledge when senior employees leave. Nexus doesn't just answer questions — it preserves, connects, and surfaces institutional wisdom.
project_philosophy.differentiation: Treats documents as a connected knowledge system with personality, not just a search index

market_context.market_analysis: RAG is the #1 most in-demand AI skill in 2026

key_statistics.talent_gap_morocco: 35% annual demand growth vs 15-20% supply growth

market_context.moroccan_alignment: Maroc Digital 2030 (9.95B MAD investment), Maroc IA 2030 (100B MAD value)

portfolio_project_selection.decision: Build RAG-Powered Enterprise Document Assistant FIRST
rationale: RAG is the absolute #1 most in-demand AI engineering skill in 2026
Every company building with LLMs needs RAG expertise
Market demand proven by Upwork's 2026 official report
Universal pitch: 'Ask questions to your documents' works across all industries
Fastest path to freelance clients and job offers

alternatives_rejected.reason: Niche, requires industry contacts, slower to demo
Overlaps heavily with RAG; build after #1
Saturated market, seen as tutorial project

product_naming.name: NEXUS
product_naming.why: Suggests connection, institutional intelligence, web of knowledge

v1_differentiators.name: Contradiction Radar
v1_differentiators.description: Detects when two documents disagree and surfaces both sides
v1_differentiators.infj_angle: You see what others miss. Refuse false-confidence answers.
v1_differentiators.enterprise_value: Compliance, legal, HR teams would pay $10k for this alone
v1_differentiators.example: HR Policy (2023) says 15 days notice. Employment Contract says 30 days. There is a conflict.

v1_differentiators.name: Knowledge Gap Detective
v1_differentiators.description: Proactively tells users what's MISSING from their documents
v1_differentiators.infj_angle: INFJs see the unseen. Absence of information is itself information.
v1_differentiators.enterprise_value: Risk management for enterprises. Legal and compliance teams love this.
v1_differentiators.example: You asked about refund policy for international clients. Your documents don't contain any information on this topic — this may be a gap.

v1_differentiators.name: Cross-Document Insight Engine
v1_differentiators.infj_angle: The intuitive leap, the connection no one asked for but everyone needed
v1_differentiators.enterprise_value: What senior consultants charge $500/hr to do manually
v1_differentiators.example: You asked about onboarding timelines. Documents B, C, F together suggest your onboarding conflicts with probation policy.

v1_differentiators.name: Radical Transparency Mode
v1_differentiators.description: Every answer includes visible confidence score + plain-English reasoning
v1_differentiators.infj_angle: Radical honesty. Most systems fake confidence. Yours refuses to.
v1_differentiators.enterprise_value: Wrong confident answer = millions in losses. Honest uncertainty is a feature.
v1_differentiators.example: Confidence: 67% — Based on single source from 2021. Two documents partially contradict.

v2_roadmap.name: Temporal Staleness Alerts
v2_roadmap.description: Flags when answers are based on old content

v2_roadmap.name: The Devil's Advocate Mode
v2_roadmap.description: Challenges your decision using the documents

v2_roadmap.name: Narrative Synthesis Mode
v2_roadmap.description: Toggle between bullet points and flowing narrative storytelling

v2_roadmap.name: Session Memory + Continuity
v2_roadmap.description: Remembers past questions, builds on them across sessions

v2_roadmap.name: Role-Based Knowledge Layers
v2_roadmap.description: Different users see different documents based on role (HR/Engineering/Finance)
v2_roadmap.note: #1 enterprise requirement for deployment at scale

v2_roadmap.name: What Would Change My Answer
v2_roadmap.description: Tells users 'If documents contained X, my answer would be different'

deployment: Free hosting: Hugging Face Spaces, Replit
